metadata.title: Rose's Indoor Designs Free Premium Asset Sprint
metadata.notes: All assets are CC0 or CC BY (with attribution tracking). Download via links below, normalize in Blender using the provided Python script, then register via automation.

nextSteps: Verify each URL is still valid and downloads correctly
Download all assets to ./assets/models/temp/ with naming: {category}_{id}_{source_abbr}.glb
For each asset, run Blender normalization script (coordinates, scale, pivot)
Run auto-registration script to batch-update MODEL_REGISTRY, FURN_ITEMS, asset-manifest.json
Run verification suite (load room, add each asset, check 3D render)
